clip_meta.subject: U0101
clip_meta.frame_sampling: entropy-keyframe (uniform locally; full entropy on Kaggle with RGB)

messages.content:
You are an expert logistics analyst watching warehouse packaging operations. You will be shown 8 frames entropy-sampled from a 5-second video clip at 25fps (336x336). Frames are selected to capture key visual moments including operation boundaries.

Identify the dominant packaging operation, its temporal boundaries (0-based frame indices within the 8 sampled frames), and predict the next operation in the workflow.

Respond ONLY with valid JSON:
{
  "clip_id": "<string>",
  "dominant_operation": "<one of: Box Setup|Inner Packing|Tape|Put Items|Pack|Wrap|Label|Final Check|Idle|Unknown>",
  "temporal_segment": {"start_frame": <int 0-7>, "end_frame": <int 0-7>},
  "anticipated_next_operation": "<same 10 classes>",
  "confidence": <float 0.0-1.0>
}

content.text:
Clip ID: U0101_S0100_t0046
Analyze these entropy-sampled frames from a warehouse packaging video. Identify the dominant operation, temporal boundaries (0-based within these 8 frames), and predict the next operation.
